prompt:
9:16 vertical — 3x3 grid collage (nine images) forming a Korean idol portrait photoshoot series. One young Korean female idol, maintaining 100% consistency in facial features, proportions, hairstyle, and identity across all nine shots.

Natural, ultra-realistic skin texture, no retouching, no smoothing. Clean idol-style minimal makeup, soft glow, subtle imperfections.

Hair: long, voluminous dark hair, slightly tousled, natural loose flow, slight movement — consistent across all frames.

Outfit: white shirt + short bottoms (or simple neutral-toned outfit), Korean idol photoshoot styling, youthful and clean. Same outfit across all frames.

Setting: minimal studio or simple indoor environment, plain wall, soft window light. Focus on subject.

Lighting: soft diffused natural light, gentle highlights, low contrast, slightly airy tones, subtle film-like softness.

Camera: intimate portrait photography, slightly handheld feel, minor grain, slight blur in motion frames, imperfect framing.

Frame layout (3x3):
Top row: standing naturally/side gaze | facing camera/casual mid-motion | slight side angle/candid
Middle row: looking slightly upward/thoughtful | close-up/direct eye contact/idol smile | body turning/mid-motion
Bottom row: seated or leaning/relaxed | back partially turned/looking over shoulder | standing close/playful soft expression

Mood: Korean idol photobook/photocard aesthetic, intimate, soft, natural, everyday charm. Ultra-realistic 8K, subtle analog film grain, natural imperfections, soft dreamy tone.
